title: ARTEMIS, ARGUS
description:
Repello.ai —  Enterprise AI-security suite combining continuous autonomous red-teaming (ARTEMIS) and adaptive runtime protection (ARGUS), offering model-agnostic, multimodal security, CI/CD integration, and mappings to OWASP, NIST, and MITRE frameworks

ARTEMIS — Continuously stress-tests applications using 1,200+ curated attack techniques mapped to 270+ GenAI vulnerabilities, producing structured results aligned to OWASP LLM-Top-10, NIST RMF, and MITRE ATL with severity, impact, and remediation.

ARGUS — Real-time runtime security that blocks malicious prompts, jailbreaks, and harmful outputs under 200 ms across text, image, and voice; provides multimodal filtering (100+ languages), adaptive guardrails, audit logging, and policy enforcement

items: Available Agent Scanning, Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Multi-agent scenario simulations for collusion, misalignment, or deception detection.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
